Semanticki DB model\n\n## Pregled entiteta i tablica\n\nAplikacija koristi sljedece EF entitete (tablice):\n- UserProfile\n- Purchase\n- Merchant\n- SpendingSession\n- BudgetPlan\n- WishlistItem\n- Tag\n- PurchaseTags (join tablica za N-N vezu Purchase-Tag)\n\n## Entiteti i glavna svojstva\n\n### UserProfile\n- Id (PK)\n- FirstName\n- LastName\n- Email\n- DateOfBirth\n- MonthlyNetIncome\n- RiskToleranceScore\n- CreatedAt\n\n### Purchase\n- Id (PK)\n- UserProfileId (FK -> UserProfile)\n- MerchantId (FK -> Merchant)\n- SpendingSessionId (FK, nullable -> SpendingSession)\n- BudgetPlanId (FK, nullable -> BudgetPlan)\n- WishlistItemId (FK, nullable, unique -> WishlistItem)\n- Title\n- Amount\n- Currency\n- PurchasedAt\n- MoodBeforePurchase\n- NeedLevel\n- TriggerType\n- Installments\n- Notes (nullable)\n\n### Merchant\n- Id (PK)\n- Name\n- Category\n- CountryCode\n- IsOnlineOnly\n- AverageDeliveryDays (nullable)\n\n### SpendingSession\n- Id (PK)\n- UserProfileId (FK -> UserProfile)\n- StartedAt\n- EndedAt (nullable)\n- Platform\n- Channel\n- SessionBudget\n- SpentAmount\n- ItemsViewed\n- ItemsAddedToCart\n- CheckoutCompleted\n\n### BudgetPlan\n- Id (PK)\n- UserProfileId (FK -> UserProfile)\n- Name\n- ValidFrom\n- ValidTo\n- MonthlyLimit\n- ImpulseCapPercentage\n- EssentialCategoryLimit\n- DiscretionaryCategoryLimit\n- IsActive\n\n### WishlistItem\n- Id (PK)\n- UserProfileId (FK -> UserProfile)\n- Name\n- DesiredPrice\n- CurrentPrice\n- Priority\n- AddedAt\n- TargetPurchaseDate (nullable)\n- Reason\n- IsPurchased\n- LinkUrl\n\n### Tag\n- Id (PK)\n- Name\n- ColorHex\n- Description\n\n## Veze medu tablicama\n\n### 1-N veze\n- UserProfile (1) -> Purchase (N)\n  - FK: Purchase.UserProfileId\n  - OnDelete: Restrict\n\n- Merchant (1) -> Purchase (N)\n  - FK: Purchase.MerchantId\n  - OnDelete: Restrict\n\n- SpendingSession (1) -> Purchase (N)\n  - FK: Purchase.SpendingSessionId (nullable)\n  - OnDelete: SetNull\n\n- BudgetPlan (1) -> Purchase (N)\n  - FK: Purchase.BudgetPlanId (nullable)\n  - OnDelete: SetNull\n\n- UserProfile (1) -> SpendingSession (N)\n  - FK: SpendingSession.UserProfileId\n  - OnDelete: Cascade\n\n- UserProfile (1) -> BudgetPlan (N)\n  - FK: BudgetPlan.UserProfileId\n  - OnDelete: Cascade\n\n- UserProfile (1) -> WishlistItem (N)\n  - FK: WishlistItem.UserProfileId\n  - OnDelete: Cascade\n\n### 1-1 veza\n- WishlistItem (1) <-> Purchase (0..1)\n  - FK je na Purchase.WishlistItemId (nullable, unique)\n  - OnDelete: SetNull\n\n### N-N veza\n- Purchase (N) <-> Tag (N)\n  - join tablica: PurchaseTags\n  - kljucevi: PurchasesId, TagsId\n\n## Napomena o modeliranju\n- Routanje i UI sloj su odvojeni od semantickog DB modela.\n- TriggerType je enum u domeni (pohranjuje se kao numericka vrijednost u tablici Purchase).\n"},"tool_use_id":"call_5SIh8ty71HCTr8xnvCVlrwsS__vscode-1776965303095","cwd":"d:\\dev\\impulse-spending-tracker"}

Sitemap (semanticki model usmjeravanja)\n\n## Napomena\nAplikacija koristi kombinaciju:\n- attribute routing (`app.MapControllers()`)\n- konvencionalni default routing (`{controller=Home}/{action=Index}/{id?}`)\n\nZbog toga su neke akcije dostupne preko vise URL-ova.\n\n## URL -> Controller -> Akcija -> View\n\n| URL | Controller | Akcija | View | Tip rute |\n| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |\n| `/` | HomeController | Index | Views/Home/Index.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/error` | HomeController | Error | Views/Shared/Error.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/users` | UserProfilesController | Index | Views/UserProfiles/Index.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/users/{id:int}` | UserProfilesController | Details | Views/UserProfiles/Details.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/purchases-log` | PurchasesController | Index | Views/Purchases/Index.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/purchases-log/{id:int}` | PurchasesController | Details | Views/Purchases/Details.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/budget-plans` | BudgetPlansController | Index | Views/BudgetPlans/Index.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/budget-plans/{id:int}` | BudgetPlansController | Details | Views/BudgetPlans/Details.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/merchants` | MerchantsController | Index | Views/Merchants/Index.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/merchants/{id:int}` | MerchantsController | Details | Views/Merchants/Details.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/sessions` | SpendingSessionsController | Index | Views/SpendingSessions/Index.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/sessions/{id:int}` | SpendingSessionsController | Details | Views/SpendingSessions/Details.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/tags` | TagsController | Index | Views/Tags/Index.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/tags/{id:int}` | TagsController | Details | Views/Tags/Details.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/wishlist` | WishlistItemsController | Index | Views/WishlistItems/Index.cshtml | Attribute |\n| `/wishlist/{id:int}` | WishlistItemsController | Details | Views/WishlistItems/Details.cshtml | Attribute |\n\n## Dodatno dostupni URL-ovi preko default rute\n\n| URL | Controller | Akcija | View | Tip rute |\n| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |\n| `/Home/Index` | HomeController | Index | Views/Home/Index.cshtml | Default |\n| `/Home/Error` | HomeController | Error | Views/Shared/Error.cshtml | Default |\n| `/UserProfiles/Index` | UserProfilesController | Index | Views/UserProfiles/Index.cshtml | Default |\n| `/UserProfiles/Details/{id}` | UserProfilesController | Details | Views/UserProfiles/Details.cshtml | Default |\n| `/Purchases/Index` |
